concerns.text: Task T022 implements class weighting/SMOTE mitigation for imbalance, but FR-006 requires flagging datasets with imbalance >3:1 as 'unsuitable for binary classification' — mitigation contradicts the spec's hard requirement

SC-002 requires measuring descriptor accuracy against DScribe benchmark values (±0.02 tolerance), but T008 is a schema contract test and T011 implements computation without explicit benchmark validation task
FR-006 requires flagging imbalance >3:1 as 'unsuitable for binary classification' but T019 only flags and T022 mitigates — the spec's hard stop is silently relaxed to a soft flag with workarounds

Task T006 creates download_and_verify.py with 'placeholder URL' for verified datasets, but T017 sample_dataset.py depends on actual data — if T006 never obtains real data, T017 samples nothing (broken dependency chain)
FR-007 requires sampling to fit memory capacity but T017 does not specify sampling method (random, stratified, etc.) — testability gap for reproducible sampling

Task T028 implements stratification by alloy system type for structural variance control, but this capability is not specified in any user story or functional requirement — scope creep that should be documented in spec
